issues.title: [Vector store] Clickhouse support
issues.body:
**Expected Behavior**

I would like to store embeddings in Clickhouse database and search related text there.

**Current Behavior**

There is no Clickhouse support.

**Context**

https://clickhouse.com/blog/vector-search-clickhouse-p2

Langchain4j supports Clickhouse.

comments.body: @markpollack WDYT, where Clickhouse vector store should be placed - here in core or in spring-ai-community?

Hi.  This sounds like a good candidate for spring-ai-community.  You should first create some working code and then submit a request [here](https://github.com/spring-ai-community/community/issues/new?template=application.yml).

Cheers!
@markpollack Created project request in spring-ai-community, can you please review it. Thank you 🙏

If somebody needs it right now - I've just published it to maven central
https://central.sonatype.com/artifact/io.github.linarkou/spring-ai-starter-vector-store-clickhouse
